title: senecio longipilus
intro: Senecio longipilus is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to expel worms and parasites from the body, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Senecio longipilus include its use as a natural anthelmintic, helping to alleviate symptoms of parasitic infections and promoting digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tinctures and infusions, are often used to treat various gastrointestinal issues, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
